name: geeky-orchestration
description: Plan, review, execute, inspect, and archive feature work with durable planning packets and deterministic quality gates.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, execute, and track feature work end to end.
interface.longDescription: Workflow skills for feature planning, plan review, implementation, implementation review, status checks, archiving, and spec research. Includes planning-packet validators, task templates, advisory hooks, and an optional MCP server for quality gates.
defaultPrompt: Create a geeky-plan packet for this feature.
Review this implementation plan before execution.
Run geeky-status on this planning folder.
